controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall be applicable with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short title, scope and commencement of the directions
a) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Electronic Trading Platforms) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to an electronic system operated by a
controls.control_description: c) These Directions shall not apply to an electronic system operated by a
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to an electronic system operated by a

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide any report, data and/or information as required by the reserve bank and/or report transaction information to any trade repository or reporting
controls.control_description:
Provided that in respect of such electronic systems, all scheduled
commercial banks and standalone primary dealers shall provide any
report, data and/or information as required by the Reserve Bank and/or
report transaction information to any trade repository or reporting
platform in the format and within the timeframe prescribed, and in the
mode and manner advised;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to provide any report, data and/or information as required by the reserve bank and/or report transaction information to any trade repository or reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on being satisfied that it is necessary in public interest or to regulate the <image> financial system of the country to its advantage, advise any s
controls.control_description:
and
Notwithstanding this general exemption, the Reserve Bank may, on
being satisfied that it is necessary in public interest or to regulate the
<image>
financial system of the country to its advantage, advise any such
electronic system or class of electronic systems to comply with any or all
conditions in these Directions or to seek authorisation under these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , on being satisfied that it is necessary in public interest or to regulate the <image> financial system of the country to its advantage, advise any s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been taken under these directions
controls.control_description:
d) Any authorisation granted or any action taken under the Electronic Trading
Platforms (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018 shall be deemed to have been
taken under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been taken under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: e) These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any trade originated by a software programme using automated execution logic
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Algorithmic trading' or 'Algo trading' shall mean any trade originated by
a software programme using automated execution logic.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to mean any trade originated by a software programme using automated execution logic

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any electronic system, other than a recognised stock exchange, on which transactions in eligible instruments as defined herein are contracted
controls.control_description:
(ii) 'Electronic Trading Platform' (ETP) shall mean any electronic system,
other than a recognised stock exchange, on which transactions in eligible
instruments as defined herein are contracted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any electronic system, other than a recognised stock exchange, on which transactions in eligible instruments as defined herein are contracted

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean securities, money market instruments, foreign exchange instruments, derivatives, or other instruments of like nature, as may be specified by the
controls.control_description:
(iii) 'Eligible Instruments' shall mean securities, money market instruments,
foreign exchange instruments, derivatives, or other instruments of like
nature, as may be specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time under
section 45W of Chapter III-D of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean securities, money market instruments, foreign exchange instruments, derivatives, or other instruments of like nature, as may be specified by the

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any person whether natural or legal
controls.control_description:
(iv) In these Directions, unless the subject or the context otherwise requires,
'Entity' shall mean any person whether natural or legal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any person whether natural or legal

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an entity authorised by the reserve bank to operate an etp under these directions
controls.control_description:
(v) 'ETP Operator' shall mean an entity authorised by the Reserve Bank to
operate an ETP under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an entity authorised by the reserve bank to operate an etp under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(51) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(vi) 'Key managerial personnel' shall have the same meaning as assigned to
it in section 2(51) of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(51) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(57) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(vii) 'Net worth' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(57)
of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(57) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person resident outside india' as defined in section 2(w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
(viii) 'Non-resident' shall mean a 'person resident outside India' as defined in
section 2(w) of Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person resident outside india' as defined in section 2(w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(n) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
(ix) 'Foreign exchange' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in
section 2(n) of the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(n) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person resident in india' as defined in section 2(v) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
(x) 'Resident' shall mean a 'person resident in India' as defined in section
2(v) of the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person resident in india' as defined in section 2(v) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contracts (regulations) act, 1956
controls.control_description:
(xi) 'Recognised stock exchange' shall have the same meaning as assigned
to it in section 2(f) of the Securities Contracts (Regulations) Act, 1956.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contracts (regulations) act, 1956

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or under the foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
b) Words and expressions used, but not defined in these Directions, shall have
the same meaning as assigned to them in the Act or under the Foreign
Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or under the foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure operate an etp covered under the scope of these directions without obtaining prior authorisation of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Save as otherwise permitted in these Directions, no entity shall operate an ETP
covered under the scope of these Directions without obtaining prior authorisation of
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to operate an etp covered under the scope of these directions without obtaining prior authorisation of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that transactions only in instruments approved by the reserve bank at the time of authorisation or at any later point of time when conditions o
controls.control_description:
In respect of eligible instruments, ETP operators authorised by the
Reserve Bank shall ensure that transactions only in instruments approved by the
Reserve Bank at the time of authorisation or at any later point of time when conditions
of authorisation are altered are contracted on their platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that transactions only in instruments approved by the reserve bank at the time of authorisation or at any later point of time when conditions o

controls.control_objective: To ensure fulfil the following criteria:
controls.control_description:
Eligibility Criteria for authorisation of ETPs
a) An entity seeking authorisation as an ETP operator to commence or carry on
ETP operations shall fulfil the following criteria:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fulfil the following criteria:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a company incorporated in india
controls.control_description: The entity shall be a company incorporated in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a company incorporated in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to all applicable laws and regulations, including the foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
Shareholding by non-residents, if any, in the entity seeking
authorisation as an ETP operator shall conform to all applicable laws
and regulations, including the Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conform to all applicable laws and regulations, including the foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure have experience of at least three years in operating trading infrastructure in financial markets
controls.control_description:
The entity seeking authorisation as an ETP operator or a minimum of
two of its key managerial personnel shall have experience of at least
three years in operating trading infrastructure in financial markets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have experience of at least three years in operating trading infrastructure in financial markets

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net-worth of ₹5 crore (rupees five crore only) and shall continue to maintain this minimum net- worth at all times
controls.control_description:
(ii) Financial Criteria: An entity seeking authorisation as an ETP operator
under these Directions shall have a minimum net-worth of ₹5 crore
(Rupees five crore only) and shall continue to maintain this minimum net-
worth at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net-worth of ₹5 crore (rupees five crore only) and shall continue to maintain this minimum net- worth at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the minimum, fulfil the following technological requirements: a
controls.control_description:
(iii) Technological Criteria: The entity seeking authorisation as an ETP
operator shall, at the minimum, fulfil the following technological
requirements:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the minimum, fulfil the following technological requirements: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application, through the pravaah portal of the reserve bank, in the format given in annex - 1 to the chief general manager, financial market
controls.control_description:
Grant / cancellation of Authorisation to operate an ETP
a) Entities satisfying the eligibility criteria prescribed under these Directions may
submit an application, through the PRAVAAH portal of the Reserve Bank, in
the format given in Annex - 1 to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets
Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of India, for grant of authorisation to
operate an ETP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application, through the pravaah portal of the reserve bank, in the format given in annex - 1 to the chief general manager, financial market

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such additional information and clarification
controls.control_description:
b) The Reserve Bank may, inter alia, call for any additional information, including
information related to any external grading/rating or any third-party assessment
of the platform, or seek any clarification from the applicant which in the opinion
of the Reserve Bank is relevant and the applicant shall furnish such additional
information and clarification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such additional information and clarification

controls.control_objective: To ensure also obtain any additional information from other regulators or government departments/agencies or any other authority, which in the opinion of the re
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may also obtain any additional
information from other regulators or Government departments/agencies or any
other authority, which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant for the
disposal of the application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also obtain any additional information from other regulators or government departments/agencies or any other authority, which in the opinion of the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant an applicant the authorization to operate an etp, after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria
controls.control_description:
c) The Reserve Bank may grant an applicant the authorization to operate an ETP,
after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant an applicant the authorization to operate an etp, after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the terms and conditions that may be stipulated in the authorisation letter
controls.control_description:
The grant of
authorisation may be subject to the terms and conditions that may be stipulated
in the authorisation letter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the terms and conditions that may be stipulated in the authorisation letter

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may initiate such steps as may be necessary, including
imposing additional conditions, if the ETP operator is found to violate the
provisions of these Directions or any other rules or regulations or conditions of
authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure cancel an authorisation issued to an entity to operate an etp, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard
controls.control_description:
<image>
f) The Reserve Bank may cancel an authorisation issued to an entity to operate
an ETP, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard, if it is satisfied
that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cancel an authorisation issued to an entity to operate an etp, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure stop the etp operations with immediate effect or from any other date which the reserve bank may specifically indicate
controls.control_description:
g) In case of cancellation of authorisation by the Reserve Bank, the operator of
the ETP concerned shall stop the ETP operations with immediate effect or from
any other date which the Reserve Bank may specifically indicate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stop the etp operations with immediate effect or from any other date which the reserve bank may specifically indicate

controls.control_objective: To ensure surrender the letter of authorisation in original to the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
In such case,
the ETP operator shall surrender the letter of authorisation in original to the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to surrender the letter of authorisation in original to the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description:
Operating Framework
a) Access and participation: An ETP operator shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for using the etp, processing and execution of orders, risk management and control
controls.control_description:
(iv) Have well documented rules and regulations regarding, but not limited
to, on-boarding, suspension and cessation of membership, roles and
responsibilities of the members and the operator, liability framework for
the ETP and its users in case of breach of rules and regulations,
restrictions or other requirements that may apply for using the ETP,
processing and execution of orders, risk management and control;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for using the etp, processing and execution of orders, risk management and control

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive risk management framework, including a robust internal control framework, covering all aspects of its operations
controls.control_description:
(i) An ETP operator shall put in place a comprehensive risk management
framework, including a robust internal control framework, covering all
aspects of its operations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive risk management framework, including a robust internal control framework, covering all aspects of its operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that risks associated with its operations are identified properly and managed prudently
controls.control_description:
It shall ensure that risks associated with its
operations are identified properly and managed prudently.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that risks associated with its operations are identified properly and managed prudently

controls.control_objective: To ensure : a
controls.control_description:
(ii) An ETP operator shall:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : a

controls.control_objective: To ensure : a
controls.control_description:
(iii) An ETP operator that provides/facilitates participation by algorithmic
trading systems (algo systems) shall:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : a

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place rules and regulations in a transparent manner to deal with exigencies like suspension/cessation of trading or cancellation of orders/trad
controls.control_description:
(iv) An ETP operator shall put in place rules and regulations in a transparent
manner to deal with exigencies like suspension/cessation of trading or
cancellation of orders/trades, malfunctions in its systems or erroneous
use by its members, or any other unforeseen situation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place rules and regulations in a transparent manner to deal with exigencies like suspension/cessation of trading or cancellation of orders/trad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be dealt with in accordance with clearly laid down rules and regulations
controls.control_description:
Such exigencies
should be dealt with in accordance with clearly laid down rules and
regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be dealt with in accordance with clearly laid down rules and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place an arrangement to address any dispute that may arise or is likely to arise between its members
controls.control_description:
(v) An ETP operator shall put in place an arrangement to address any
dispute that may arise or is likely to arise between its members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place an arrangement to address any dispute that may arise or is likely to arise between its members

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement surveillance systems and controls to ensure fair and orderly trading to maintain market integrity and monitor trading activity on a real tim
controls.control_description:
c) Surveillance: An ETP operator shall implement surveillance systems and
controls to ensure fair and orderly trading to maintain market integrity and
monitor trading activity on a real time and post facto basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement surveillance systems and controls to ensure fair and orderly trading to maintain market integrity and monitor trading activity on a real tim

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify and disclose to the reserve bank conflicts of interest
controls.control_description:
d) Conflict of Interest: An ETP operator shall identify and disclose to the Reserve
Bank conflicts of interest, if any, arising from the participation of related parties
or group agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to identify and disclose to the reserve bank conflicts of interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a fair, non-discriminatory and transparent fee structure for its members
controls.control_description:
e) Transparency: An ETP operator shall implement a fair, non-discriminatory and
transparent fee structure for its members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a fair, non-discriminatory and transparent fee structure for its members

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that:
controls.control_description:
f) Outsourcing of operations: An ETP operator which outsources its
operations/technology/activities, partially or fully, shall ensure that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place a suitable business continuity plan (bcp) including contingency and disaster recovery arrangements that are appropriate to the nature, s
controls.control_description:
g) Business Continuity and Disaster recovery: An ETP operator shall have in
place a suitable Business Continuity Plan (BCP) including contingency and
disaster recovery arrangements that are appropriate to the nature, scale and
complexity of its business to ensure continuity and availability of its operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place a suitable business continuity plan (bcp) including contingency and disaster recovery arrangements that are appropriate to the nature, s

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place robust information/cyber security controls and processes along with adequate information and data security infrastructure
controls.control_description:
h) Information Security: An ETP operator shall put in place robust
information/cyber security controls and processes along with adequate
information and data security infrastructure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place robust information/cyber security controls and processes along with adequate information and data security infrastructure

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to information/cyber security norms/guidelines
controls.control_description:
It should adhere to
information/cyber security norms/guidelines, if any, prescribed by the Reserve
Bank or any other regulator or public authority from time to time, as applicable
to it.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to information/cyber security norms/guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out it/is audit, at least once in a year, by auditors with certified information system auditor (cisa) certificates or auditors empanelled by in
controls.control_description:
i) IT/IS Audit: An ETP operator shall carry out IT/IS audit, at least once in a year,
by auditors with Certified Information System Auditor (CISA) certificates or
auditors empanelled by Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT-
In) or such other professional bodies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out it/is audit, at least once in a year, by auditors with certified information system auditor (cisa) certificates or auditors empanelled by in

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion order an it/is audit of the etp by an independent auditor(s), selected by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such IT/IS audits, the
Reserve Bank may, at its discretion order an IT/IS audit of the ETP by an
independent auditor(s), selected by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion order an it/is audit of the etp by an independent auditor(s), selected by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure confidentiality and security of all data relating to activities on the etp
controls.control_description:
(i) An ETP operator shall ensure confidentiality and security of all data
relating to activities on the ETP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure confidentiality and security of all data relating to activities on the etp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly under the control of the etp operator
controls.control_description:
Access to such data should be strictly
under the control of the ETP operator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly under the control of the etp operator

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained in easily retrievable media for at least 10 years
controls.control_description:
(ii) All data relating to activities on the ETP shall be maintained in easily
retrievable media for at least 10 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained in easily retrievable media for at least 10 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained for at least three years from the date of completion of the investigation
controls.control_description:
Without prejudice to the minimum
requirement for storage of data, the data sought for any investigation by
the Reserve Bank or any other authority as required under Indian laws
or regulations shall be maintained for at least three years from the date
of completion of the investigation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained for at least three years from the date of completion of the investigation

controls.control_objective: To ensure direct the operator to share all data relating to activities on the etp with the reserve bank or any other agency that it may specify
controls.control_description:
(iii) In the event of cancellation of authorisation by the Reserve Bank or the
termination of the operations by the ETP operator, the Reserve Bank
may direct the operator to share all data relating to activities on the ETP
with the Reserve Bank or any other agency that it may specify;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to direct the operator to share all data relating to activities on the etp with the reserve bank or any other agency that it may specify

controls.control_objective: To ensure share such data in the manner and form specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
and the
<image>
ETP operator shall share such data in the manner and form specified by
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share such data in the manner and form specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish a quarterly report on the functioning of the platform to the reserve bank in the format prescribed in annex - 2, on or before the 15th day of
controls.control_description:
Reporting requirements
a) An ETP operator shall furnish a quarterly report on the functioning of the
platform to the Reserve Bank in the format prescribed in Annex - 2, on or before
the 15th day of the month following the quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish a quarterly report on the functioning of the platform to the reserve bank in the format prescribed in annex - 2, on or before the 15th day of

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish a report, in respect of each financial year, to the reserve bank, on the status of their compliance with these directions and the terms and co
controls.control_description:
b) An ETP operator shall furnish a report, in respect of each financial year, to the
Reserve Bank, on the status of their compliance with these Directions and the
terms and conditions prescribed to them at the time of grant of authorization or
subsequently on or before the 30th of April of the succeeding financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish a report, in respect of each financial year, to the reserve bank, on the status of their compliance with these directions and the terms and co

controls.control_objective: To ensure report transaction information to any trade repository or reporting platform, in the format and within the timeframe prescribed and in the manner, as
controls.control_description:
c) An ETP operator shall report transaction information to any trade repository or
reporting platform, in the format and within the timeframe prescribed and in the
manner, as specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report transaction information to any trade repository or reporting platform, in the format and within the timeframe prescribed and in the manner, as

controls.control_objective: To ensure also provide any other report, data and/or information as required by the reserve bank in the format and within the timeframe prescribed, and in the m
controls.control_description:
d) An ETP operator shall also provide any other report, data and/or information as
required by the Reserve Bank in the format and within the timeframe
prescribed, and in the mode and manner advised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also provide any other report, data and/or information as required by the reserve bank in the format and within the timeframe prescribed, and in the m

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide data/information to any other agencies/authorities as may be required under the indian laws
controls.control_description:
e) An ETP operator shall provide data/information to any other
agencies/authorities as may be required under the Indian laws.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide data/information to any other agencies/authorities as may be required under the indian laws

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the reserve bank promptly informed through email of any event resulting in disruption of activities or market abuse
controls.control_description:
f) An ETP operator shall keep the Reserve Bank promptly informed through email
of any event resulting in disruption of activities or market abuse.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the reserve bank promptly informed through email of any event resulting in disruption of activities or market abuse

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the terms and conditions that may be stipulated by the reserve bank in this regard
controls.control_description:
Termination of operation: An ETP operator, who is holding a letter of
authorisation to commence or carry on ETP operations, may terminate its operation
with prior approval of the Reserve Bank with regard to timing and date of termination
of operations, and shall comply with the terms and conditions that may be stipulated
by the Reserve Bank in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the terms and conditions that may be stipulated by the reserve bank in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure surrender to the reserve bank the letter of authorisation in original granted to it to commence or carry on the etp operations
controls.control_description:
In such case, the ETP operator shall surrender to
the Reserve Bank the letter of authorisation in original granted to it to commence or
carry on the ETP operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to surrender to the reserve bank the letter of authorisation in original granted to it to commence or carry on the etp operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure exempt any etp operator or class of etp operators either generally or for such period as may be specified, from any or all of the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
Other Directions
a) The Reserve Bank, on being satisfied that it is necessary to do so, may exempt
any ETP operator or class of ETP operators either generally or for such period
as may be specified, from any or all of the provisions of these Directions, subject
<image>
to such terms or conditions or limitations or restrictions as it may think fit and
proper to impose, in the interest of public or financial system of the country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exempt any etp operator or class of etp operators either generally or for such period as may be specified, from any or all of the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit this report, for each etp which it is authorized to operate, at the end of every quarter through email within fifteen calendar days from the en
controls.control_description:
of transacti
name
spread (where applicable)
order matching
etc.)
ons)
(one row for each instrument hosted and each dealing mode provided by the ETP)

Note: The entity operating an ETP shall submit this report, for each ETP which it is authorized to operate, at the end of every quarter through email within fifteen calendar days from the end of the quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit this report, for each etp which it is authorized to operate, at the end of every quarter through email within fifteen calendar days from the en
